# ASVAB Hero

> ASVAB Hero (asvabhero.com) is a free, adaptive ASVAB test-prep app. It gives a free diagnostic with an estimated AFQT score, free score calculators (AFQT, GT, line/composite, branch-specific), 500+ military job matches, and a daily adaptive practice loop built on the methods cognitive science shows actually raise scores. Free account includes the saved score report, weakest-topic map, spaced Mistake Bank, and a daily adaptive block; Pro ($14.99/mo, or a one-time $59 90-Day Pass) adds unlimited practice, full-length timed simulations, and deeper analytics.

## Tools (free, no signup)
- [AFQT Calculator](https://asvabhero.com/afqt-calculator): compute your AFQT percentile from subtest standard scores (uses the official PAY97 norming table).
- [GT Score Calculator](https://asvabhero.com/gt-score-calculator): estimate your GT (General Technical) line score.
- [Line / Composite Score Calculator](https://asvabhero.com/asvab-line-score-calculator): branch composite line scores.
- [ASVAB Score Converter](https://asvabhero.com/asvab-score-converter): raw vs standard vs AFQT.
- [Free ASVAB Practice Test](https://asvabhero.com/free-asvab-practice-test): timed 30-question diagnostic across all 9 subtests with an estimated AFQT.
- [Free practice by subtest](https://asvabhero.com/free-asvab-practice-tests): free questions with worked answer explanations for each of the 9 subtests.
- [Full-length ASVAB practice test](https://asvabhero.com/full-length-asvab-practice-test): what a full-length run involves (all 9 subtests, about 135 scored questions, timed).
- [What jobs qualify with my ASVAB score](https://asvabhero.com/what-jobs-qualify-asvab-score)

## Active duty (AFCT retest)
- [AFCT practice test](https://asvabhero.com/afct-practice-test)
- [AFCT overview](https://asvabhero.com/afct)

## For educators (counselors, librarians, JROTC)
- [ASVAB counselor quick-start](https://asvabhero.com/counselor-resources): a plain, source-cited ASVAB reference (what the test is, how scores work, official prep resources, where to send students). Cites official sources only; no signup.
- [ASVAB at a Glance (printable PDF)](https://asvabhero.com/asvab-at-a-glance.pdf): a plain, source-cited one-sheet reference for students and parents (the nine subtests, AFQT, how scores work). No branding or signup.
